records.m_Talk_ENG: *Yawn.* The waves were so rough, I couldn't get any sleep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Yawn.* The waves were so rough, I couldn't get any sleep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Yawn.* The waves were so rough, I couldn't get any sleep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Why do they even need 24-hour surveillance here? It's not like anyone's going to find us in the middle of nowhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Why do they even need 24-hour surveillance here? It's not like anyone's going to find us in the middle of nowhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Why do they even need 24-hour surveillance here? It's not like anyone's going to find us in the middle of nowhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-why is the safe open?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-why is the safe open?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-why is the safe open?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The safe's been robbed!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The safe's been robbed!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The safe's been robbed!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's an intruder on the ship! Find them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's an intruder on the ship! Find them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's an intruder on the ship! Find them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nnngh! Why won't the engine start?
records.m_Talk_VTN: Nnngh! T86qi sao 96e87kng c98q kh9580ng kh879i 96e87kng?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nnngh! Why won't the engine start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nnngh! Why won't the engine start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe you loaded too much on the boat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe you loaded too much on the boat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe you loaded too much on the boat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this isn't even 10% of the whole safe!
records.m_Talk_VTN: Tuy nhi95xn, 96e95ry th86{m ch95{ kh9580ng ph86si l95p 10% c87wa to95pn b87k k959t s86}t!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this isn't even 10% of the whole safe!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this isn't even 10% of the whole safe!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe the problem was renting a piece-of-junk boat that can't even carry this amount!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe the problem was renting a piece-of-junk boat that can't even carry this amount!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe the problem was renting a piece-of-junk boat that can't even carry this amount!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't have any cash. It was either this or a ducky boat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't have any cash. It was either this or a ducky boat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't have any cash. It was either this or a ducky boat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! I found a gold bar here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! I found a gold bar here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! I found a gold bar here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Over there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Over there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Over there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaa! They found us!
records.m_Talk_VTN: Kyaaa! Ch9586ng 96e95s t95zm th86uy ch9586ng ta r87gi!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaa! They found us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaa! They found us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you can't expect to make money without a fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you can't expect to make money without a fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you can't expect to make money without a fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave as soon as you get the engine running.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave as soon as you get the engine running.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave as soon as you get the engine running.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about you, Captain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about you, Captain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about you, Captain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you worry about me. I've got my ways.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you worry about me. I've got my ways.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you worry about me. I've got my ways.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your honorable sacrifice! We'll never forget it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your honorable sacrifice! We'll never forget it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your honorable sacrifice! We'll never forget it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, ya seasick, has-been scurvy dogs! Wanna play?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, ya seasick, has-been scurvy dogs! Wanna play?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, ya seasick, has-been scurvy dogs! Wanna play?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dracasia?! Stop her from running away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dracasia?! Stop her from running away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dracasia?! Stop her from running away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use the anti-Counter weapons!
records.m_Talk_VTN: S87{ d87ung v979 kh95{ ch87eng Counter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Use the anti-Counter weapons!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Use the anti-Counter weapons!
